Function.Inference: Bars 1-8 establish the accompaniment groove and end with a |: repeat mark.
Bars 9-70 contain the main loop body, ending with a :| repeat mark.

Section.Inference: Intro establishes the rhythmic and harmonic foundation.
Section A presents the main thematic motif, which repeats after a rest.
Section B introduces a fundamentally new, lyrical melody with sustained notes.
Section C shifts texture to focus on a rhythmic ostinato motif.
Section D features ascending arpeggios that lead back to the loop start.
